message:
🐛 Fix stack selector scrollbar jumping from top to bottom (#788)

The scrollbar in the stack selector dropdown was nearly invisible
(8px wide, 30% opacity thumb on transparent track) making it
impossible to grab and drag. Users could only click the track,
which jumps by a full page — causing the "top to bottom jump"
behavior.

Changes:
- Increase scroll container height from 320px to 448px (28rem)
  so more items visible and scrollbar thumb is larger/easier to grab
- Add wider scrollbar (12px) with visible track background
- Make scrollbar thumb more opaque (60% vs 30%) with hover state
- Remove debug console.log that fired on every stacks update

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
